Hero.subtitle: 2nd Year DAW Student
Hero.description: I build modern, functional and well-structured web projects.

About.title: System / Profile
About.subtitle: My focus & commitment
About.paragraph1: I am Kevin, a 2nd year DAW student in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria.
About.paragraph2: I like creating clean, fast, and easy-to-use websites. I am building my portfolio with real projects to continue learning and to help businesses, churches, associations, and institutions have a professional online presence.
About.paragraph3: I seek to grow as a developer, work on purpose-driven projects, and take care of both the design and the technical side.
About.location_val: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Spain
About.focus_val: Websites for businesses, institutions, and purpose-driven projects
About.interests_val: Frontend, UI design, databases, and deployment
About.brand_desc: Kev Dev is my personal brand as a web developer: a way to unite design, code, and well-documented solutions.

Stack.title: Technological Ecosystem
Stack.subtitle: My daily technologies and development tools
Stack.frontend_desc: Interactive and responsive interfaces optimized for great user experiences.
Stack.backend_desc: Robust server logic, validation mechanisms, and secure RESTful APIs.
Stack.database_desc: Relational design, efficient queries, relationships, and CRUD with MySQL and PostgreSQL.
Stack.tools_desc: Deployment management, system admin, virtualization, and advanced developer tools.
Stack.method_desc: Clear planning, rigorous technical documentation, and automated deployment.

Featured.title: Featured Project
Featured.subtitle: High-performance real capstone project
Featured.description: Complete online booking and management system for musical rehearsal studios. Handles schedule conflicts on server, secure RLS, and automated emails.
Featured.feature_1: Real-time reservation system with server-side overlap checks.
Featured.feature_2: Admin dashboard with revenue tracking and charts.
Featured.feature_3: Strict Row-Level Security (RLS) for user data protection.
Featured.learning_1: Concurrency handling and relational database schemas.
Featured.learning_2: Web speed audit optimization and Next.js ISR.
Featured.learning_4: Secure management of private environment variables.
Featured.preview_instructions: Add a real Garage Studios screenshot

Projects.subtitle: Other academic and experimental repositories
Projects.garage_desc: Real booking platform for rehearsal studios built with Next.js and Supabase.
Projects.task_desc: Academic application for structured task management in teams.
Projects.school_desc: REST API design for classroom grades, schedules, and attendance.
Projects.future_desc: Planned SaaS platform for freelancers invoicing and expenses.

Method.title: Process
Method.subtitle: My structured workflow
Method.step1_desc: Initial consultation to understand the key project objectives.
Method.step2_desc: Clear definition of all technical requirements.
Method.step3_desc: Layout design, prototyping, and database schemas.
Method.step4_desc: Structured frontend and backend development in fast sprints.
Method.step5_desc: Build audit tests, local debug runs, and deployment.
Method.step6_desc: Proactive maintenance, performance tuning, and updates.

Services.title: Services
Services.subtitle: Tailored web solutions
Services.price_note: Each project is quoted based on goals, content, features, design and required maintenance.
Services.item1_desc: A single high-impact page to present a business, service, church, association, personal brand or project.
Services.item1_ideal: People or organizations that need a clear, fast and professional digital presence.
Services.item2_desc: A complete website with several sections or pages: home, about, services, gallery, FAQ and contact.
Services.item2_ideal: Businesses, institutions or projects that want to explain what they do and build more trust.
Services.item3_desc: A simple store to showcase products, organize categories and receive orders through WhatsApp or direct contact.
Services.item3_ideal: Small businesses, personal brands, churches, associations or projects that want to start selling online in a simple way.
Services.item4_desc: A website with dynamic features such as bookings, advanced forms, client management, private panel, database or basic automations.
Services.item4_ideal: Businesses, studios, churches or institutions that need to automate processes and organize information better.
Services.item5_desc: A custom solution for specific ideas, dashboards, automations, simple online stores or special features.
Services.item5_ideal: People, businesses or organizations with a specific need that requires an adapted solution.
Services.item6_desc: Small content changes, link checks, visual adjustments, section updates and light technical support.
Services.item6_ideal: Clients who already have a website and want to keep it updated without handling the technical side.

FAQ.title: FAQs
FAQ.subtitle: Quick doubts about my profile and scope
FAQ.a1: Yes. I am open to controlled-scope web projects, collaborations and professional opportunities related to web development.
FAQ.q2: What kind of websites can you build?
FAQ.a2: I can build landing pages, multi-section websites, portfolios, websites for businesses or institutions, contact forms, simple booking flows and mobile-friendly functional websites.
FAQ.q3: Do you work with businesses, churches or institutions?
FAQ.a3: Yes. I can create websites for local businesses, churches, associations, personal projects, small brands and institutions that need a clear and professional online presence.
FAQ.q4: How long can a website take?
FAQ.a4: It depends on the scope. A simple landing page takes less time than a multi-section website or a website with advanced features. Before starting, I review the needs, content and goals.
FAQ.a5: Prices are indicative. The final price may vary depending on content, number of sections, features, languages, maintenance and level of customization.
FAQ.q6: What do I need to prepare before starting?
FAQ.a6: Ideally, you should have a clear goal, basic texts, images or logo if available, contact details and examples of websites you like as references.
FAQ.a7: Yes. Every website is planned with responsive design so it works properly on mobile, tablet and desktop.
FAQ.a8: Yes. I can offer optional maintenance for small content changes, link checks, visual adjustments, basic improvements and light technical support.
FAQ.a9: Yes. I can work remotely and communicate through WhatsApp, email or online meetings if the project requires it.
FAQ.a10: I am based in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Spain.
FAQ.a11: I mainly work with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Git, GitHub and Vercel.
FAQ.a12: The portfolio is still evolving. I will keep updating it with new projects, improvements, an updated CV and LinkedIn when they are ready.

Timeline.title: Evolution
Timeline.subtitle: My technical learning path
Timeline.stage1_desc: Development of complete web projects applying modern frontend, backend, databases, authentication, deployment and technical documentation.
Timeline.stage2_desc: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL, MySQL, Git and relational databases.
Timeline.stage3_desc: First scripts, logic, algorithms and development fundamentals.

LegalNotice.meta_description: Legal information for the personal portfolio of Kevin Ochoa González, web developer under the Kev Dev brand.
LegalNotice.title: Legal Notice
LegalNotice.location_val: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Spain
LegalNotice.purpose_text: This site is a personal portfolio for showcasing projects and web development services.
LegalNotice.prices_text: Published prices are indicative and may vary depending on scope, features, content, and required maintenance.
LegalNotice.content_text: All content, texts, design, the Kev Dev brand, and visual assets are part of the personal portfolio, except externally sourced resources that are explicitly indicated.
LegalNotice.prohibition_text: Copying, reproducing, or reusing the design, texts, or brand without express permission from the owner is not permitted.
LegalNotice.liability_text: The owner is not liable for misuse of the published information or for the content of any external links.

PrivacyPolicy.meta_description: Privacy policy for the personal portfolio of Kevin Ochoa González. Information on how personal data is handled.
PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.purpose_text: To respond to enquiries received by email, WhatsApp, phone call, or GitHub.
PrivacyPolicy.data_text: Name or identifier if provided by the user, email address, phone number, and message content.
PrivacyPolicy.legal_basis_text: User consent, given by voluntarily making contact.
PrivacyPolicy.retention_text: For as long as necessary to respond to and manage the communication.
PrivacyPolicy.no_sale_text: Data is never sold to third parties under any circumstances.
PrivacyPolicy.no_transfer_text: Data is not shared with third parties except where legally required.
PrivacyPolicy.rights_text: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, and other applicable rights by writing to the contact email.
PrivacyPolicy.no_form_text: In this version of the portfolio there is no contact form that stores data in a database.

CookiePolicy.meta_description: Cookie policy for the personal portfolio of Kevin Ochoa González. Information on cookie usage on this site.
CookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
CookiePolicy.current_text: This website does not use analytics, advertising, or third-party tracking cookies in its current version.
CookiePolicy.technical_text: Technical cookies necessary for correct site functionality may be present if required by future features.
CookiePolicy.future_text: If analytics, measurement tools, or external services requiring cookies are added in the future, this policy will be updated and the corresponding notice will be displayed.
